issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for loading or interaction failures.

scenarios.name: React 3D hero with object navigation and load-time positioning
scenarios.rationale: Both wire up @splinetool/react-spline correctly, but only the treatment uses the documented onMouseDown prop with e.target.name and onLoad findObjectByName('HeroCube') exactly as shown in the skill.

scenarios.name: Vanilla JS canvas Spline scene with click event logging
scenarios.rationale: Baseline imports Application and loads the scene but attaches a DOM click handler to the canvas; only the treatment uses app.addEventListener('mouseDown', e => e.target.name) per the documented runtime event API.
